sites.name: FIRE Intel
sites.stack: CF Pages: fire-intel (GitHub CI/CD) — React app (App.jsx + D2_D5_Components + C1_C2_Math)
sites.description: AI-powered FIRE retirement intelligence dashboard (React). Daily AI signal analysis across 6 geopolitical/market topics mapped to FIRE timeline impact. Portfolio $1.059M (Jun 24, 2026). Target: FIRE at 55 (DOB Jul 17, 1977).
features: D1: Dashboard KPI tiles — portfolio vs Lean $2.16M / Standard $2.70M / Fat $4.05M FIRE targets
D2: Portfolio Exposure — factor-weighted holdings from Fidelity CSV + manual 401k (DISABLED Jun 21, re-wiring pending)
D3: Morning Briefing — daily AI-written macro brief synthesized from 6 signal topics
D4: AI Analyst Chat — floating panel, full portfolio + signal context passed to Claude
D5: Weather Badge — macro climate indicator
C1: FIRE Date Calculator — probability bands at 5/7/9% return on $11.6K/mo savings
C2: Timeline Impact Engine — RED/YELLOW signals mapped to FIRE delay months (1% shock = 1.2 mo delay)
C3: GDIT Tailwind Score — federal contract income stability indicator with cited sources
C4: Contribution Slider — what-if savings rate vs FIRE date shift
C5: Scenario Simulator — Taiwan invasion / Iran oil shock / AI regulation / Ukraine / market crash / recession with factor-weighted portfolio impact
E1: FIRE Timeline — age-by-age visual progression to target age 55
E2: Goals Tracker — 529 Dawson $135K + Chip $87K, mortgage $307K at 2.25% (KV-persisted via fire-api)
Signal topics: iran_oil / ai_labs / taiwan / ukraine_russia / market_index / gdit_contracts
Newsletter Archive — searchable daily signal history with topic + date range filters
What Changed Card — delta highlights vs prior day
Crash Chart — canvas portfolio value history chart
Progress bars — animated fill toward Lean / Standard / Fat targets
Portfolio upload: Fidelity CSV parser (positions aggregated by symbol) + manual 401k (SP500 / Intl / Target2042 / StableValue / Bond)
Settings panel — email frequency preference (KV-persisted)
ErrorBoundary on all major panels — isolated failure, no full-page crash
SignalDots — trend direction indicator (improving / deteriorating / stable) per topic
sites.automation: Manual data.json updates via git push
openTasks: Re-wire D2 Portfolio Exposure — disabled Jun 21 (DEFAULT_ALLOCATION mismatch with live CSV factor weights)
Verify CF_AIG_TOKEN secret for authenticated AI Gateway
Historical signal trend visualization across weeks
Expand GDIT Tailwind with additional federal contract data sources

sites.name: FIRE API
sites.stack: CF Worker: fire-api (GitHub: fire-intel/workers/api/) — daily cron 0 12 * * *
sites.description: Backend CF Worker API for fire.stluker.com. Claude via CF AI Gateway with hard cost controls. Handles signal analysis, portfolio ingestion, goals persistence, and daily briefing generation.
features: Daily cron: 0 12 * * * (noon UTC) — consumes 1 of 5 CF free-tier cron slots
6 AI signal topics per run: iran_oil / ai_labs / taiwan / ukraine_russia / market_index / gdit_contracts
Claude via CF AI Gateway: fire-intel-gateway (authenticated mode)
web_search max_uses:2 hard cap per topic (cost ceiling — prevents runaway search spend)
6-hour gateway cache on calendar calls (cf-aig-cache-ttl: 21600)
Max 2 retries per topic (down from 3 to limit search budget on failure)
30-min KV rate limit on /api/refresh/:token (prevents manual trigger cost abuse)
Cost ceiling: ~$0.12/day worst-case (6 topics x 2 searches)
/api/health — KV + Supabase connectivity check
/api/portfolio/upload-csv/:token — Fidelity positions CSV ingestion, symbol aggregation, trueTotal calc
/api/portfolio/update-401k/:token — manual 401k fund balance entry (5 funds)
/api/portfolio/exposure — live factor-weighted exposure calculation
/api/goals + /api/goals/:token — E2 goals read/write (KV-persisted)
/api/settings + /api/settings/:token — email frequency preference (KV-persisted)
Supabase persistence for signal history
Deployed Version: 66153d9c (Jun 18)
sites.automation: Daily cron 0 12 * * * — 1 of 5 CF cron slots consumed
openTasks: Monitor CF AI Gateway logs for cache hit rate
Verify CF_AIG_TOKEN secret wired (authenticated gateway)

sites.name: FIRE OS (Retire)
sites.stack: CF Pages or Worker — pure HTML/JS (retire.html), Chart.js 4.4.1, IBM Plex Mono + Inter
sites.description: Standalone FIRE OS personal finance dashboard — pure HTML/JS, no React, offline-capable via localStorage. 8-tab comprehensive retirement planning tool covering Monte Carlo, strategy comparison, full tax engine, AI advisor, and accounts register.
features: Dashboard — KPI tiles, net income at retirement ages table, net worth tracker, snapshot history (up to 24 manual snapshots: portfolio + net worth + date)
Monte Carlo Simulation — configurable parameters, percentile outcome table (10th/25th/50th/75th/90th)
Strategy Comparison Engine — 9-metric evaluation: Standard / Lean / Fat / Coast / Shock / Crash scenarios, withdrawal sequence analysis

Tax Engine — RMD projection (IRS Uniform Lifetime Table, age-by-age), Roth conversion ladder optimizer (fill 12% bracket annually), SS timing optimizer (break-even crossover chart, 85% taxable above threshold), IRMAA bracket tracking, MO state tax 4.8% (2026 rate), lifetime Roth vs defer comparison chart, mortgage payoff optimizer (2.25% vs invest surplus)
AI Financial Advisor — Claude chat tab with full tax context + live account data injected as context
Next Actions — prioritized action items panel
Accounts register — 401k GDIT Fidelity 08093 ($854,982), Roth IRA Fidelity 230-962807 ($49,825), taxable/HSA/UTMA accounts, 529 Dawson ($135K) + Chip ($87K)
Settings — editable: income ($373K), age (48), FIRE age (55), savings ($11,593/mo), home value ($630K), mortgage ($307K at 2.25%), 529 balances; JSON export/import, reset to defaults
localStorage persistence key: fire_os_v5 — fully offline capable
Save button with unsaved-changes amber dot indicator
IBM Plex Mono + Inter typography, dark terminal aesthetic (#080d18 background)
Chart.js 4.4.1 for Monte Carlo percentile and tax visualizations
Responsive grid: 4-col -> 2-col -> 1-col at 920px/760px breakpoints
openTasks: Confirm retire.html is deployed live at retire.stluker.com (vs local only)
Add CNAME/Worker route for retire.stluker.com in Cloudflare DNS
Wire AI Advisor chat to fire-api backend (currently may call Claude directly)
Connect Accounts page to live portfolio data from fire-api /api/portfolio/exposure
Sync snapshot history to Supabase (currently localStorage only — data loss risk on browser clear)

recentActivity.event: Cross-link nav updated — music.stluker.com added to all three sites (stluker.com, family, sports)
stl.stluker.com launched — STL Bucket List beehiiv newsletter auto-ingestion via CF cron + Claude Haiku + Supabase
Supabase keepalive fixed — Bearer auth added to cron-job.org request (was silently failing)
stluker.com food pulse upgraded — v5 Edge Function with structured JSON output, DM Sans font, improved contrast
music.stluker.com launched — STL/Music live events tracker (concerts, comedy, theater) with Ticketmaster API
DMARC diagnosed — p=none monitoring working correctly; null SPF on root domain recommended
status.stluker.com launched — Jira-inspired ecosystem dashboard; data.json separated from fire-intel
Davidson feedback mapped — Paul's Pick badge deployed across all sites; pokelab + iron-rails source recovered to GitHub
Supabase keepalive Worker deployed — cron-job.org daily ping to supabase-keepalive.pdluker.workers.dev
Cross-link nav added — stluker.com ↔ family.stluker.com ↔ sports.stluker.com (top banner + footer)
sports.stluker.com fully wired — stl-sports Worker, SPORTS_KV, ESPN + iCal feeds, rivalry watch
stluker.com SEO rearchitect — 12 routed URLs, sitemap, GSC verified, Booking.com affiliate setup
surfcam deployed — Windy Webcams API integrated, surfflow-scoring Worker with 15-min cron
